commit.message:
Fix pivoting-agent lint: put search_skills/list_skills on same line as "do not"

The lint test checks per-line for search_skills()/list_skills() references
and only exempts lines containing "do not" or "never call". The prohibition
was split across two lines, so the line with the function names didn't match.

commit.message:
Add pivot-aware scanning to network-recon, improve dashboard agent lifecycle

network-recon skill:
- Add "Pivot Mode" section with two-phase scanning approach
- Phase 1: fast host discovery on pivot host (ARP, ping sweep, DNS zone,
  single-port proxychains sweep)
- Phase 2: targeted nmap through proxychains on known-live hosts only
- Document nmap MCP server limitation (no proxychains support)
- Add static nmap alternative for speed-critical scenarios
- Add pivot-specific troubleshooting entries

Dashboard (tail-agent.py):
- Auto-discover new agents from tasks directory (no .dashboard file needed)
- Red *stopped* indicator in pane header for dead agents
- Detect agent completion via JSONL final message + 5s mtime debounce
- Detect killed agents (TaskStop) via 30s mtime staleness
- Keep stopped agents visible instead of auto-removing
- Space bar toggles agents in/out from browser overlay

commit.message:
Fix force re-enrich pagination — was re-enriching same 10 deals indefinitely

Force mode had no pagination: every batch fetched the same first 10 rows,
enriched them, remaining never reached 0 (counted by the normal filter),
and the stuck-batch guard exited with 260 deals still unprocessed.

Fix: route now accepts an offset param and uses .range() + .order('id')
in force mode, counting remaining as (totalDeals - offset - batchSize).
Client tracks nextOffset returned by each batch and passes it on the next
call, advancing through all 270 deals without re-visiting any row.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix 'Always This Category' to use current dropdown values

The button was reading category from the saved DB value instead of the
currently selected dropdown. Now sends form data via hx-include and
also saves the transaction before creating the alias rule.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix stamp count not refreshing in real-time on customer wallet

The realtime handler was reading directly from payload.new which requires
specific Supabase replica identity settings. Now calls fetchData() instead,
which is always reliable. Also adds a 15s polling interval as a fallback
in case the realtime event doesn't fire.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve pop sheet outputs: Warhol poster grid + screenprint aesthetics

Poster grid now pre-generates evenly-distributed backgrounds across the
full color wheel (360°/n hue steps, sat 0.84–0.97) so each panel reads
as a distinct vivid Warhol Marilyn color study. Body colors derive from
complementary/triadic offsets of each panel's own background.

Screenprint uses paper-tinted backgrounds (sat 0.06–0.26, light 0.82–0.94)
with richer spot-ink values (sat 0.70–0.90, 3 flat levels) that read against
the light ground. Misregistration upgraded to a 2px directional shift per
panel with 30% ink bleed at color boundaries, plus screen-mesh dropout and
ink grain texture — completely distinct from the poster grid palette feel.

v0.3.7: "not familiar" triggers prerequisite check + plan revision

When a learner writes "not familiar", the session now:
1. Checks the Prerequisite Graph for uncompleted prerequisite SGs
2. Checks the Principle Extraction table for external prerequisites
   not covered by any existing SG
3. If a missing prerequisite is found, offers PLAN-REVISION:
   (A) add prerequisite SG and run it first, or (B) continue as-is
4. Otherwise delivers the Full 7-Section Concept Explanation as before

This extends PLAN-REVISION-REQUEST (previously only triggered by
term-clarifier Category C critical) to also fire on "not familiar".

commit.message:
Fix wrong analyser.js path causing app crash and broken upload (#3)

index.html referenced js/core/analyser.js but the file lives at
js/analyser.js. The resulting 404 left Analyser undefined, causing
the App constructor to throw before any event listeners were attached
— which is why the Upload File button (and everything else) did not work.

fix: color selector hover contrast in dark and light mode (#486)

* fix: color selector hover contrast in dark/light mode

Two bugs in the navbar theme selector:

1. Dark mode hover invisible: --bs-link-hover-color was globally set to
   darken($base-color, 15%) ≈ #2d5250 with no dark mode override. On the
   dark body background (#181818) the contrast ratio was ~1.1:1. Fix:
   override --bs-link-hover-color to $dark-primary (#66b2a9) in the dark
   mode block.

2. Light mode active item invisible + no hover feedback: --bd-violet-rgb
   was referenced in _navbar.scss for dropdown hover/active backgrounds
   but never defined. The browser fell back to transparent, producing
   white-on-white (invisible) active items in light mode. Fix: define
   --bd-violet-bg and --bd-violet-rgb in :root using $base-color, and
   override with $dark-primary values inside the dark mode block.

3. Explicitly set color: $white on the dark mode dropdown-item
   hover/focus/active rule to prevent any cascade conflict with the
   .btn:focus-visible rule.

Fixes #485

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: update visual regression snapshots from CI

* fix: keep --bd-violet-rgb as base-color in dark mode

Using $dark-primary (#66b2a9, light teal) for --bd-violet-rgb/bg in dark
mode would make the navbar gradient light teal, dropping the contrast
between the gradient and the rgba(white, 0.85) nav link text to ~2.5:1
(WCAG AA fail).

Keep --bd-violet-rgb/bg as $base-color (#478079) in dark mode so the
darker teal gradient maintains sufficient contrast with white text.
Only --bs-link-hover-color uses $dark-primary (the actual fix for the
hover text visibility issue).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove --bd-violet-rgb dependency, use direct SCSS values in navbar

Defining --bd-violet-rgb globally activated the ::after navbar gradient
that was previously invisible (the variable was undefined), turning the
navbar bright teal. This reverts that approach.

Instead:
- Remove the ::after gradient block (it was never rendering; display:none
  makes the intent explicit)
- Replace var(--bd-violet-bg) on .offcanvas-lg with $base-color directly
- Replace var(--bd-violet-rgb) in dropdown hover/active CSS vars with
  interpolated SCSS values: rgba($base-color, .1) and $base-color

The --bs-link-hover-color dark mode override and the explicit color:white
on dark mode dropdown items are retained as the actual contrast fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: update visual regression snapshots from CI

* fix: remove duplicate btn:focus-visible rule that turned buttons white in dark mode

A second .btn:focus-visible block (color: black; background-color: white)
was overriding the earlier one (box-shadow only), causing any focused
button in dark mode — including the language and theme selectors — to
render as a jarring white box with black text.

Removing the duplicate leaves the box-shadow focus ring (line ~294)
intact as the sole focus indicator, which is readable on dark backgrounds
without inverting button colors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

fix: differentiate prompt timeout by session type (#267)

* task: move fix-prompt-timeout-by-session-type to active

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: differentiate prompt timeout by session type

Workspace chat sessions (no TaskID) now have no prompt timeout (0 = disabled).
Task-driven sessions use ACP_TASK_PROMPT_TIMEOUT (default 6h).

Previously all sessions shared a 1-hour timeout via ACP_PROMPT_TIMEOUT,
causing workspace chat sessions to timeout unexpectedly.

bookstore/management/commands/import_shop_sales.py 신규 생성

- CSV 파일 기반 mclass.shop → mclass.co.kr 데이터 이전 도구
- 학생 이름으로 매칭 후 student_id를 shop 기준으로 업데이트

- --dry-run 옵션: DB 변경 없이 미리보기
- transaction.atomic() 으로 오류 시 전체 롤백
- 인코딩 자동 감지 (UTF-8-SIG → CP949)
- 상세 요약 보고서 출력 (매칭/건너뜀/생성 통계)

사용법:
  python manage.py import_shop_sales shop_sales.csv --dry-run
  python manage.py import_shop_sales shop_sales.csv

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: change && to ; before nohup to fix bash update script lingering (#117)

Shell operator precedence: `cd X && nohup node Y & disown` is parsed as
`(cd X && nohup node Y) &` which runs node in foreground of a subshell.
Changing `&&` to `;` ensures only `nohup node ... &` is backgrounded.

acceptance criteria, and cost tuning guidance instead of physics tutorial.
